item.title: Firewall allowlist uses hand-rolled YAML parser
item.intent: Firewall allowlist is parsed reliably. No hand-rolled YAML in the codebase.
item.description: src/build/launcher/firewall.ts loadAllowlist() implements a custom line-by-line YAML parser instead of using the 'yaml' package already in package.json. The hand-rolled parser is brittle — it won't handle quoted values, inline lists, comments, or multi-document YAML correctly. Steps: (1) replace loadAllowlist() to use yaml.parse() from the 'yaml' package; (2) update allowlist.yaml type to match parsed structure; (3) add tests covering edge cases (quoted domains, comments, empty file). Scope: small — one function in one file.
